name: CAM Covers
tagline: Turn your photos into music album covers.
description: Transform ordinary photos into professional-looking album covers, inspired by real music players like Spotify.
storeDescription: Spotted that viral trend of turning selfies into music album covers? CAM Covers makes it instant. Pick a player template, drop in your photo, customize the title and artist name — then share straight to Instagram. No design skills required.

features.title: Multiple Player Templates
features.description: Choose from templates inspired by real music players. Each has a distinct aesthetic — find the one that fits your vibe.

features.title: Fully Customizable
features.description: Edit the song title, artist name, and decorative elements. Every detail is yours to control.

features.title: Share Instantly
features.description: Export and share to Instagram, WhatsApp, or save to your gallery — all in one tap.

features.title: Freemium Model
features.description: Core features are free. Unlock premium templates and remove ads with a one-time upgrade.

buildStory.problem: I tried to create an album cover montage manually on Instagram and it took forever — stickers, manual cropping, multiple apps. There had to be a faster way.
buildStory.solution: An app that uses Flutter's own rendering system as the editing canvas. RenderRepaintBoundary captures the live UI as a high-res image. No complex image manipulation library needed — Flutter itself became the editor.
buildStory.learned: AI-assisted template creation cut 8 hours of design work to under 1 hour. I used Claude 3.5 via Cursor to generate 4 templates from 2 existing ones. The lesson: think about what parts of your product can be accelerated with AI before writing them from scratch.

name: Virtual Pocket Air Conditioning
tagline: Better sleep starts with the right sound.
description: Virtual air conditioning in your pocket — a relaxing sound that helps you sleep better at night.
storeDescription: Struggling to fall asleep? Virtual Pocket Air Conditioning turns your phone into a white noise machine — playing the calming, continuous hum of an air conditioner so you can drift off faster and sleep deeper. Created as a fun project to study animations in Flutter.

features.title: Realistic AC Sound
features.description: High-quality audio loop that mimics a real air conditioner — no distracting cuts or loops.

features.title: Sleep-Optimized
features.description: Continuous playback designed to mask background noise and help your brain wind down.

features.title: Battery Friendly
features.description: Lightweight and optimized so it won't drain your battery overnight.

features.title: Simple & Distraction-Free
features.description: One tap to start. No ads, no unnecessary permissions, no friction.

buildStory.problem: I couldn't sleep without background noise. Air conditioning units are expensive and not always available — so I built a virtual one.
buildStory.solution: A dead-simple Flutter app that plays a looped AC ambient sound. The project also served as a sandbox for experimenting with animations in Flutter.
buildStory.learned: The apps users keep are the ones that do one thing extremely well. No feature creep needed.

name: The Slime Dungeon
tagline: Surrounded by adorable danger. How long can you last?
description: Survive in a dungeon full of slimes! You are stuck with adorable creatures. How long can you survive?
storeDescription: You wake up trapped in a dungeon filled with slimes — cute, relentless, and closing in. Dodge, survive, and see how long your reflexes hold. A fast-paced survival game built with Flutter and the Bonfire game engine.

features.title: Survival Gameplay
features.description: Classic arcade survival loop — stay alive as long as possible against increasingly aggressive slimes.

features.title: Adorable Enemies
features.description: Slimes are cute. They're also relentless. The contrast makes losing feel almost okay.

features.title: Fast Sessions
features.description: Each run takes seconds to start and minutes to master. Perfect for short breaks.

features.title: Built with Bonfire
features.description: Powered by the Bonfire game engine on top of Flutter — smooth performance on Android.

buildStory.problem: I wanted to build a mobile game that was genuinely fun to play — not just a tutorial project I'd never open again.
buildStory.solution: A survival dungeon game with a single twist: the enemies are cute slimes. Used Flutter with the Bonfire engine, which gave me RPG-style game mechanics without writing a full engine from scratch.
buildStory.learned: Game feel matters more than graphics. Getting the movement and hit detection right took longer than building the entire visual layer. Bonfire made the RPG primitives easy — the hard part was tuning the difficulty curve.

name: Direção Fácil
tagline: Pass your CNH exam. 5 minutes a day.
description: Gamified app to help Brazilians pass the CNH theoretical driving exam through short lessons and interactive quizzes.
storeDescription: Direção Fácil is a Duolingo-style app for studying the Brazilian driver's license (CNH) theoretical exam. Study traffic laws, signaling, and defensive driving in 5-minute lessons, then test yourself with realistic practice exams that mirror the official DETRAN format.

features.title: 9 Official DETRAN Modules
features.description: All content mapped to official exam topics: legislation, signaling, defensive driving, first aid, mechanics, and more.

features.title: 5-Minute Lessons
features.description: Short, focused sessions designed to fit into your day — no hour-long study marathons required.

features.title: Gamified Progress
features.description: Points, levels, and achievements keep you coming back — the same loop that makes Duolingo addictive.

features.title: Realistic Practice Exams
features.description: Simulados that match the official DETRAN test format so there are no surprises on exam day.

buildStory.problem: Studying for the CNH theoretical exam in Brazil is boring, dense, and most people fail on the first try because the study materials are awful.
buildStory.solution: A gamified study app modeled after Duolingo — short lessons, adaptive quizzes, and realistic simulados covering all 9 official DETRAN modules.
buildStory.learned: Gamification only works when the core learning loop is solid. Points and levels are motivators, not substitutes for well-structured content.

name: Emoji Memory Jetpack
tagline: Train your brain. Match your emojis.
description: Match similar emojis. Memory game open-source, built with Android Jetpack Compose.
storeDescription: A fun and colorful memory card game built entirely with Jetpack Compose. Flip cards, find matching emoji pairs, and challenge your brain — all in a smooth, modern Android UI.

features.title: Emoji Cards
features.description: Vibrant emoji pairs that make the game visually engaging and universally accessible.

features.title: Jetpack Compose
features.description: Built entirely with Jetpack Compose — smooth animations, declarative UI, modern Android.

features.title: Open Source
features.description: Full source code available. Learn how a real Android game is built with Compose.

features.title: Progressive Difficulty
features.description: Board sizes grow as you improve, keeping the challenge fresh every session.

buildStory.problem: I wanted to practice MVVM architecture and Jetpack Compose with a real, shipped project — not just a tutorial exercise.
buildStory.solution: A memory card game inspired by iagocavalcante/memorize, rebuilt from scratch in Kotlin with Jetpack Compose and a clean MVVM structure.
buildStory.learned: Managing game state through a ViewModel feels different from regular UI state — the ViewModel becomes the game engine, not just a data holder.

name: Petmob
tagline: Find the best care for your pet.
description: Find the best pet care provider near you, or register as a service provider and earn extra income.
storeDescription: Petmob connects pet owners with the best service providers in their area — grooming, vet visits, boarding, walks and more. Love animals? Register as a provider and start earning on your own schedule.

features.title: Find Providers
features.description: Search for pet services near you: grooming, vet, boarding, walks and more.

features.title: Earn Extra Income
features.description: Register as a provider and start serving pets in your area on your own schedule.

features.title: Verified Reviews
features.description: Choose providers based on real reviews from other pet owners in your area.

features.title: Easy Scheduling
features.description: Book services directly in the app with instant confirmation.

buildStory.problem: Finding a reliable pet caregiver is hard. Most recommendations still happen by word of mouth.
buildStory.solution: A pet services marketplace connecting owners and providers with ratings, scheduling, and integrated payments.
buildStory.learned: The biggest challenge in local services marketplaces is the bootstrap problem: the app only has value when there's density on both sides.
